docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAUL, JASON M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS ROZETTI ALLOWED PAUL TO TERMINATE 5 YEAR COMMERCIAL LEASE ALMOST TWO YEARS EARLY. THE $10,000 SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS APPLIED TOWARDS 2 MONTHS' UNPAID RENT ($7000/MO). PAUL FAILED TO RESTORE PREMISES TO PRE-LEASE RENT ($7000/MO). PAUL FAILED TO RESTORE PREMISES TO PRE-LEASE CONDITION, AS REQUIRED BY LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAUL, JASON M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS PAUL NOTIFIED ROZETTI THAT HE INTENDED TO TERMINATE 5 YEAR COMMERCIAL LEASE ALMOST TWO YEARS EARLY. ROZETTI APPLIED THE $10,000 SECURITY DEPOSIT TOWARDS 2 MONTHS UNPAID RENT (2 MONTHS @ $7000/MO.) PAUL FAILED TO RESTORE PREMISES TO PRELEASE CONDITION AS REQUIRED BY THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGEMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,008.47 FILED BY PAUL, JASON M AS TO DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DENIED***
SC-105 REQUEST*** FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER #2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAUL, JASON M
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DENIED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

ORDER - THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FORM DID NOT ACCURATELY STATE THE COURT'S JUDGMENT. ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT RECONSIDERS & CHANGES THE LANGUAGE OF THE ORIGINAL JUDGMENTON ITS OWN MOTION PER CCP 1008.
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL 130 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAUL, JASON M AS TO DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 06/15/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD RETURN TO SENDER)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JASON M PAUL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAKS ROZETTI IS PRESENT. PARTIES WERE INSTRUCTED BY THE JUDGE TO TAKE A BREAK AND ALLOW THEM SOME TIME TO REVIEW EACH OTHER'S DOCUMENTS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER*** AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAUL, JASON M AS TO DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL PO FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAUL, JASON M AS TO DEFENDANT ROZETTI, MAKS
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108A)DENIED*** BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT
